name: Magical Mirror Room
description: I'm in a Magical Mirror Room
hints: The mirror room is the first room inside the fun house. Look around carefully.
The mirror here is 'strange' - it may be important later. N leads into a windy maze.
OPEN DOOR requires wearing shoes. S goes back to the entrance.
N leads to the windy maze. You'll need to map it carefully to navigate.
notes: First room inside the fun house. The mirror is part of the puzzle. N leads to the windy maze (room 30). S returns to the entrance.
